title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building control and orchestration layers around LLM-based coding agents. It operates at two levels: designing rules, skills, hooks, and subagents for individual sessions, and orchestrating multiple focused agent sessions into larger workflows to reliably scale task execution.
